reviews.review_description: This game is so fun! And it actually has character unlike other gorilla tag fan games. I got this game over 2 years ago. when I got the game so much people were playing. And today the game STILL has people playing it. This game is THE ORIGINAL I AM CAT. Thank you all developers for making this game!

I remember I was a junior. I don’t remember what was it called but I remembered I was that if you see this the belter of this game hello this is  yc for some odd reason. I can’t play a public lobby. I have a Meta quest 3
And I don’t know if I can play be a cat can you move it to Meta quest 3 thank you

dude stop you didn't have to middle finger ME i just want to find out what was behind those rocks especially with my favorite animal cats.

I know this game won't get updates again, but I downloaded this game a year ago and it was fun to visit it again! I LOVE THE MUSIC, GO KITTY GO!!

I love this game. The avatars are so funny and I laugh every time I see them. This game needs more attention.

Good music 🎶
I loved runnning around and all that stuff but what I loved the most was climbing and I recommend this game to anyone who likes cats.

It's not my favorite game. Graphics could be
 better. Pls add more area in single-player, i am having trouble finding different areas. i do like the avatar, but i am having trouble changing colors, though overall could be a lot better, but it's still a fun game (ps love the maxwell as avatar)

i played this game alot yesterday but i suggest adding Multiplayer,if you ask how search up how to add multiplayer in ur gorilla tag fangame so u can play w ur friends,family etc,Other than that the game is pretty good! The song “go kitty go” is so cul in da background :3
thats all!
byee :3

I can’t join a server but very cool game layout maybe it’s just me cus all the other reviews say otherwise but also I can’t equip cosmetics so I’m a bit annoyed but yeah. And a ban for escaping the map! That I am truly annoyed at but every place you go it is very cool I would recommend if you like playing by yourself but a I stated before multiplayer does not work for me but maybe I’m just really stupid but really I’m not sure but you should totally play 

PS. Behind the cash register is long arms which are broken but you already kinda have long arms so yah but yeah.

So it is a good game but it lacks a number of maps. Another thing is the lag it’s fine when you’re not in a server but as soon as you go in a server it is very laggy.  And it would be nice to have more cosmetics but good game.

The games really good. I found a glitch and my friend who knows the dev told him about the glitch. The glitch is when you enter the credits room then try to leave. the map resets.

developer_response.body: yes that is fixed in the latest update, thanks for your help
